82 
DDCTBL_AMT 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary Deductible Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The amount of money the beneficiary paid towards an annual deductible. 
SHORT NAME: DDCTBL_AMT 
LONG NAME: DDCTBL_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g., 98.76) 
COMMENT: 
—
